creator: kaz@kobe1995.net
text:
After "upgrade" from 4.2 to 4.3 by sysinstall, ypbind dumps core
	forever and the system can't reach login: prompt.

Fix: 

rm -fR /usr/lib/* . Upgrade again.

	Please fix sysinstall to remove old libraries before "upgrade".
How-To-Repeat: 	Set nis_client_enable="YES" in /etc/rc.conf. Upgrade from 4.2 to 4.3.
